title: Collection of delinquency penalties
doc_html:
§455.  Collection of delinquency penalties

All money penalties, other than criminal penalties, imposed by this Chapter are payable to the secretary and shall be collected, remitted, and credited, as if they were part of the tax imposed.  

Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
doc_text:
§455.  Collection of delinquency penalties
All money penalties, other than criminal penalties, imposed by this Chapter are payable to the secretary and shall be collected, remitted, and credited, as if they were part of the tax imposed.
Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
